positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a wise, majestic owl perched on a stylized crescent moon, surrounded by delicate, blooming cosmic vines and small constellations. The style is Scandinavian doodle meets vintage celestial etching, rendered in crisp, deep indigo, matte gold, and crisp white. Focus on clean, scalable silhouettes and strong graphic contrast, designed to be a centerpiece for a high-end t-shirt print. Composition should be perfectly centered and vertically balanced, emphasizing the elegant curvature of the moon and the detailed feathering of the owl. Perfect for printing on fabric.
